fmiModelDescription.description: ECS plant model exposing fluid and scalar interfaces for analysis export.

ScalarVariable.name: Alt.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: Mach.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: Pamb.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: Tamb.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: reqCoolingTemperature.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.X[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.X[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.h
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.hn
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.m
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerRet.p
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: LHexTout.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerFeed.X[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.name: consumerFeed.hn
ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.

ScalarVariable.description: Shared thermal-fluid state passed between ECS, consumer, and fuel subsystems.
